summary: Read the pre-4.27 print's credential surfaces — `web_oauth_2_0` config key and SPOTIFY_WEB_OAUTH_2_0 env var — and promote them into the current oauth_2_0/SPOTIFY_OAUTH_2_0 fields when those are unset.
reason: The old print derived credential names from the display name (Spotify Web); the reprint derives them from the API slug (spotify). Without the fallback, upgraders' saved bearers silently stop authenticating. New names win when both are set. Flagged by Greptile P1 on the reprint PR.
validated_outcome: Three focused tests: legacy config key promotes, legacy env var honored (with auth_source label), new key wins over legacy.
